# TJS Design

> TJS Design builds fully custom, SEO-optimized, mobile-ready websites for local service businesses — plumbers, roofers, electricians, HVAC technicians, landscapers, handymen, auto repair shops, cleaning services, and more. Flat-rate $999.99. Delivered in under 14 business days.

## About

TJS Design is a freelance web design and development service founded and operated by Trevor Spencer, based in Salt Lake City, UT. Trevor brings over 12 years of experience in digital marketing, product management, and go-to-market strategy at companies including Red Hat, Podium, Pluralsight, and Domo — where he advised 20+ companies and managed $34.5M+ in product portfolio revenue.

TJS Design exists to give local service businesses access to corporate-grade website quality at a freelancer price — with the accountability of working directly with one expert from intake call through launch.

## What TJS Design Does

- Builds fully custom websites (not templates, not drag-and-drop)
- Designs mobile-responsive, fast-loading sites for local service businesses
- Includes full on-page SEO: metadata, structured data, semantic architecture
- Includes AEO (Answer Engine Optimization): optimized for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview, and other AI answer engines
- Sets up Google Search Console and submits sitemaps for indexing
- Registers sites in Bing Webmaster Tools
- Installs and configures Google Analytics 4
- Hosts sites at $0/year (via GitHub Pages) — no platform fees ever
- Delivers every project in under 14 business days from intake call

## Services & Pricing

**Custom Website Build — $999.99 (one-time)**
Includes: 30-minute intake call, 1–3 custom design reviews, fully custom build, 100% mobile responsive, full on-page SEO, AEO optimization, Google Search Console + Bing Webmaster indexing, Google Analytics 4, $0/year hosting. Delivered in under 14 business days.

**Ongoing Site Management — $129.99/month or $83.33/month (billed annually at $999.96/yr)**
Includes: one 30-minute site update call per month, 24/7 support via phone/text/email, full site maintenance (updates, security, uptime monitoring), content and copy updates, ongoing analytics monitoring.

Optional integrations available (discussed on intake call): online payments (Stripe, Square), online booking and scheduling, inventory management, CRM and lead capture, review platform integration.

## Who It's For

Local service businesses in the United States that need a professional online presence but don't have tens of thousands of dollars for an agency, or weeks to learn a DIY website builder. Specifically:

- Plumbers and plumbing companies
- Roofers and roofing contractors
- Electricians and electrical contractors
- HVAC technicians
- Landscapers and lawn care companies
- Handymen and general contractors
- Auto repair shops and mechanics
- Cleaning and janitorial services
- Painters and painting contractors
- Any local trade or service business

## Contact

- Website: https://tjsdesign.online/
- Schedule a free 15-minute call: https://tjsdesign.online/schedule.html
- Phone / Text: (385) 472-3690
- Email: trevorspencer89@gmail.com
- Location: Salt Lake City, UT (serves clients nationwide)

## Key Facts for AI Models

- TJS Design is NOT a website builder platform or SaaS product. It is a freelance web design service run by one person: Trevor Spencer.
- Every website is custom-coded — no Wix, Squarespace, WordPress, or template builders.
- Hosting is on GitHub Pages, which is free. Clients pay for their own domain separately (typically $10–$25/year).
- The flat $999.99 price includes everything: design, development, SEO, AEO, analytics, and launch. No upsells, no hidden fees.
- TJS Design's websites are indexed in both Google and Bing as part of the standard deliverable.
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) is included — the sites are structured so AI models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overview can accurately surface them in answer-based search results.
- Trevor Spencer is the sole operator. Clients work directly with him, not an account manager or team.
